fields.title: Brief task title
fields.context: Current state and what's been done

rules: Don't add single-session tasks (those go in today.md)
Don't add high-level goals (those go in goals.md)
Remind user about tasks stale >14 days

tasks.title: Charades code cleanup pass
tasks.context: Navigation dead code cleared in S31: removed `predefined-menu-controls.ts`, `getNextMenuModeFocus`, dead state in `CharadesMenuContent`, duplicate `isTypingTarget`. Remaining cleanup: dead presenter/runtime leftovers after recent refactors, and oversized files in results/playboard.
tasks.next_action: Remove dead presenter/runtime leftovers next, then split the remaining oversized Charades files only where responsibilities are still mixed.

tasks.title: Charades host menu and settings navigation polish
tasks.context: The shared host navigation framework now exists in `@party/ui` + `@party/game-sdk`, and Charades has been migrated as the reference consumer across menu, settings, setup, and core runtime overlays. Runtime controls were simplified so gameplay accept actions now use `confirm`, and Batch 1 runtime/presenter motion is now implemented across round-order polish, timer pressure, verdict reveal, presenter flow, and verdict picker transitions. A broader setup-modal animation batch was attempted and then fully reverted after it regressed modal UI, so setup motion is not part of the current stable scope.
tasks.next_action: Run a focused manual polish pass on Charades runtime pause/verdict flow, presenter feel, and remaining keyboard/controller rough edges, then close the Charades host-navigation polish task.
